message: ci: remove .prow.yaml template (causes broken Prow jobs)

files.patch:
@@ -1,20 +0,0 @@
-presubmits:
-  - name: pull-PROJECT_NAME-test-unit
-    always_run: true
-    decorate: true
-    clone_uri: "https://github.com/kubestellar/PROJECT_NAME"
-    labels:
-      preset-goproxy: "true"
-    spec:
-      containers:
-        - image: ghcr.io/kubestellar/infra/build:1.24.11-1
-          command:
-            - make
-            - test
-          env:
-            - name: USE_GOTESTSUM
-              value: "1"
-          resources:
-            requests:
-              memory: 4Gi
-              cpu: 2
